hr_consultancy_partner.label: HR Consultancies
criteria: Advises SMEs on people, compliance, and employment matters
Does not have its own software platform
operational_challenges: Clients increasingly expect software alongside advice
Risk of clients moving to larger providers with technology offerings
Growing pressure to embrace AI and automation
why_good: Regularly advise clients on HR processes and systems
Clients frequently ask for software recommendations
Can introduce Vesra as part of an existing service offering
Strong opportunity for recurring revenue and client retention
ideal_size: 50-500 client employees managed across the consultancy client base
hr_consultancy_partner.mission: Help HR consultancies thrive in the AI era.
hr_consultancy_partner.core_value_proposition: Turn HR expertise into recurring software revenue.
hr_consultancy_partner.belief: Clients increasingly expect software, self-service, and AI-powered experiences alongside professional advice.

outreach.subject: Quick question
outreach.detail: works with businesses on HR and people support
outreach.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

I came across {company_name} and noticed you provide HR support to SMEs.

One thing we have heard repeatedly from HR consultancies is that clients increasingly expect a software platform alongside advice, policies, and support.

Vesra helps HR consultancies offer a branded HR platform to clients without having to build or maintain software themselves.

The result is stronger client retention, a more complete service offering, and an additional recurring revenue stream.

Would it be worth sending over a short overview?

Best,
Chris

franchise.label: Franchise Networks
criteria: Existing operational processes but limited visibility across locations
No modern HR platform deployed consistently across the network
operational_challenges: Scaling operations as the network grows
why_good: Head office often lacks visibility into day-to-day people management across the network
Processes become inconsistent as new locations are added
Franchisees often use different systems or spreadsheets
Vesra provides a central platform that standardises people management across the network
franchise.mission: Help franchise networks scale with confidence.
franchise.core_value_proposition: Give head office visibility and consistency across every location.
franchise.belief: Growing franchise networks need modern systems to maintain consistency, visibility, and control as they scale.

outreach.subject: Quick question
outreach.detail: appears to run or support a franchise network with multiple locations
outreach.body_template:
Hi {first_name},

I came across {company_name} and noticed you operate or support a franchise network.

As franchise networks grow, it often becomes harder for head office to keep visibility and consistency across holiday management, sickness tracking, employee records, policy acknowledgements, onboarding, and compliance.

Vesra helps franchise networks give head office a clearer, more consistent HR platform across locations without having to build or maintain software themselves.

The result is better operational control, lower admin burden, reduced compliance risk, and a more consistent employee experience across the network.

Would it be worth sending over a short overview?

Best,
Chris
